title: KPop Demon Hunters Controversy Erupts From Recent Event
content: KPop Demon Hunters is set to return with a sequel following the smash success of the animated musical on Netflix, but the second chapter is still years away. Luckily, Huntrix is still finding new ways to stay in the headlines, though the latest is a news bite that many might not have seen coming.
author: ComicBook

title: Needy Girl Overdose Anime Reveals English Dub Cast, May 2 Debut
content: The English dub stars: • Michelle Marie as Purple Lollipop • Allison Hill as Michica Gokubara • Nicole Gose as Nechika-sama • Erica Mendez as Kache • Ray Chase as Kache's Boyfriend • Kellen Goff as Otaku/Narrator • Yong Yea as Otaku Customer • Heather Gonzalez as Interview The dub staff includes: • Executive Producer:…

title: North American Anime & Manga Releases for May
content: Here are the North American anime, manga, and light novel releases for April. Week 1: May 5 - 11 Anime Releases • Yagate Kimi ni Naru (Bloom Into You) Blu-ray Manga Releases • Ao no Hako (Blue Box) Vol.20 • Boruto: Two Blue Vortex Vol.5 • Choujun!

title: Netflix, Crunchyroll Add 3rd Collection of Selected Episodes of Detective Conan Anime Featuring FBI
content: TMS began streaming the first specially curated selection of episodes on July 3. The episodes are streaming in Japanese and with a new English dub by Studio Nano , different from the Bang Zoom! and Funimation dubs. The first selection of episodes is titled "Conan vs.
author: ANN

title: 3 Years Later, Crunchyroll’s Best Mystery Drama Is Finally Returning in July
content: As the largest streaming platform for anime fans around the world, Crunchyroll is home to many incredible anime series and films. Each anime season, the platform brings dozens of new series and sequels of fan-favorite shows.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix’s Live-Action Anime Movie Sees Major Success in Theaters
content: Netflix has become one of the biggest players when it comes to taking major anime franchises and recreating them for the world of live-action adaptations. One Piece, Avatar: The Last Airbender , and Yu Yu Hakusho are only a few examples of how the streaming service has seemingly conquered this realm.
author: ComicBook

title: Pac-Man Gets New 'Snack Breaks' Animated Shorts on May 22
content: Bandai Namco Entertainment revealed on Friday that its Pac-Man franchise is getting a series of animated shorts titled " Pac-Man : Snack Breaks." The first episode will debut on the franchise 's official YouTube channel on May 22, " Pac-Man Day," and new episodes will premiere every month.
author: ANN

title: Tubi Resurrects Forgotten Cartoon Network Series And More
content: Tubi has had a big year when it comes to bringing back some major entries from Cartoon Network, Nickelodeon, and other major entertainment platforms. In 2026, the streaming service brought on the likes of The Powerpuff Girls, Dexter’s Laboratory, Courage the Cowardly Dog, Ed Edd ‘n Eddy , and other beloved animated…
author: ComicBook

title: Digimon’s Biggest Movies Will Be Absolutely Free to Watch (But There’s a Catch)
content: Pokémon might be the biggest anime franchise focusing on monsters and their trainers around, but its “cousin” Digimon is still releasing a steady stream of anime and video games to this day. Since hitting the scene in 1997, the digital world has spent decades expanding its franchise across the board.
author: ComicBook
